issues.description: Missing condition to check opponent's Characters with cost ≤3 on board. Should have HasCardOnBoard or similar targeting condition.

Action is ForceDiscard (trash from hand), but effect text says 'Place 1 of your opponent's Characters... at the top or bottom of your opponent's Life cards' — this is a KO/removal action, not a hand discard. Should be KO or ReturnToHand, not ForceDiscard.
Missing second effect: 'Your opponent trashes 1 card from their hand' should be a separate action (ForceDiscard) that triggers after the character is placed on Life cards.
